query:
SELECT 
            a.symbol,
            q.price,
            q.change_pct,
            qs.score AS quant_score
        FROM intelligence.assets a
        JOIN intelligence.quotes q ON q.asset_id = a.id
        LEFT JOIN intelligence.quant_scores qs ON qs.asset_id = a.id
        ORDER BY q.change_pct DESC
        LIMIT 20
